DP.502.0000:
Ah, so that Rowan fellow is back?
He’s quite the remarkable man.\f
He’s been studying Pokémon since way,
way back.\f
My son and grandchild help Rowan
with his studies now.
DP.502.0001:
Oh, my!
You’ve got a National Pokédex?\r
How fantastic is that?!\f
Rowan should be delighted.
It will greatly help his research.\f
But, young Trainer...
You should know this.\f
In this world, there are 300...
No, 400...\f
No, no, no! There’re a lot more
kinds of Pokémon than that!
DP.502.0002:
Who are you?\f
...\f
Oh...
You’re [0103,0000]?\f
Hey, you’re doing that Pokédex thingy
for the professor!\f
Wow! That’s the same as my big
sister! Go for it!
DP.502.0003:
Who are you?\f
...\f
Oh...
You’re [0103,0000]?\f
You’re doing that Pokédex thingy
for the professor!\f
Wow! That’s the same as my big
brother! Go for it!
DP.502.0004:
Oh, hi, [0103,0000]!\f
There was news on TV saying there
is a massive outbreak of Pokémon!\f
That’d be great for filling up your
Pokédex!
DP.502.0005:
Let me see...
What did that news say now...?\f
[0104,0001]! They said there’s
a whole bunch of [0100,0002] there!\f
[0103,0000], you have to hurry!\f
I want you to do better than my
sister Dawn!
DP.502.0006:
Let me see...
What did that news say now...?\f
[0104,0001]! They said there’s
a whole bunch of [0100,0002] there!\f
[0103,0000], you have to hurry!\f
I want you to do better than my
brother Lucas!
